_comment: Single source of truth for all game-scale data. Physical dimensions (mm) define the real-world game piece sizes. Pixel measurements are taken from range_ruler_range.png at working resolution. Base graphics are measured pixel spans of the base boundary within each source PNG.

physical_dimensions_mm._comment: Real-world measurements in millimetres from the physical game. Rules Reference: 'Ship Bases', p.12; 'Setup', p.11.

base_graphics._comment: Measured pixel size of the base boundary edge-to-edge within each source PNG. Used to scale sprites so the base artwork aligns exactly with the computed game-scale bounding boxes.

card_panel._comment: Direct pixel sizes for the ship card side panels (Rebel left, Imperial right). Defense tokens display as a vertical column to the left of each card. magnify_factor is the toggle-zoom multiplier on left-click (UI-018).
